upstream_contract: proxy non-TLS absolute-form target and percent-decoded Basic credentials
proxy non-TLS auth failures resolve as HTTP responses
empty and quoted-empty proxy environment values disable proxying
empty entries domain suffixes and exact optional ports are handled safely
split CONNECT response head is consumed before origin TLS bytes
non-2xx CONNECT reply is exposed without origin redirect handling
CONNECT 3xx reply is exposed and its Location is not followed
CONNECT 101 is rejected instead of interpreted as an origin response
ftp socks4 socks5 socks5h and ws proxy URLs reject before dialing
